# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "myFunctionApp"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "eastus"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "functionAppName": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
    "storageAccountName": "[concat('storage', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
    "keyVaultName": "[concat('kv', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
    "sqlServerName": "[concat('sql', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]",
    "cosmosAccountName": "[concat('cosmos', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "accessPolicies": [],
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "standard",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": true,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": true,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2020-11-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "sqladmin",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[concat('P@ssw0rd', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-15",
      "name": "[variables('cosmosAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "GlobalDocumentDB",
      "properties": {
        "databaseAccountOfferType": "Standard",
        "consistencyPolicy": {
          "defaultConsistencyLevel": "Session"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2021-02-01",
      "name": "[variables('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "properties": {
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "functionsRuntimeVersion": "~4",
          "appSettings": []
        },
        "identity": {
          "type": "SystemAssigned"
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', variables('cosmosAccountName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'storage-contributor')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96f3dc3372c')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'key-vault-contributor')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'f25e0fa2-a7c8-4377-a976-54943a77a395')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'sql-contributor')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '6d8ee4ec-2d24-4d36-82e0-59842a247189')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'cosmos-contributor')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '808151c5-6232-45a2-9362-45e3b53a9a72')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
